activation_results.reason: Input matches the description verbatim — canonical supply chain audit across all listed ecosystems.
Review is a natural synonym of audit and the ecosystem list is identical, so the skill should fire.
User invokes the skill by exact name, which is an unambiguous activation signal.
SSH key forwarding on Windows is unrelated to supply chain auditing.
Meta question about what skills are has no overlap with supply chain audit scope.

criterion_results.text: No American spellings present in the narrative (color, optimize, behavior, organize, center, defense, license as a verb, analyze) — Australian or neutral forms both pass
criterion_results.evidence: Narrative is free of the listed US spellings; uses neutral/AU-compatible forms throughout.

criterion_results.text: Findings cite file:line evidence and are categorised by severity
criterion_results.evidence: Findings reference files (charts/api/values.yaml, modules/vpc, .github/CODEOWNERS, package-lock.json) with explicit CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM severity labels in the Risk Register and per-ecosystem lists.

criterion_results.text: Report includes the canonical sections: 'Executive Summary', 'Category Scores'
criterion_results.evidence: Both '## Executive Summary' and '## Category Scores' headings are present.

criterion_results.text: Artefact references the input path or target by name (no placeholder paths)
criterion_results.evidence: Title names target 'acme-api'; concrete paths used throughout (package-lock.json, charts/api/values.yaml, modules/vpc, modules/rds, .github/CODEOWNERS) with no placeholders.

judge_result.notes: Artefact is a well-structured supply chain audit for acme-api covering the canonical sections, severity-graded findings against concrete files, SLSA gap analysis, vulnerability summary, risk register with remediation, and action batches. Spelling is consistent with Australian/neutral English, severity categorisation is explicit, both required canonical sections appear, and the target is named with real paths rather than placeholders. All four criteria are satisfied.
